subject: Tomorrow: FarmThru opens to investors on Birchal
preheader: The Birchal campaign goes live tomorrow. VIP members get in first.
body:
This is a quick one.

Tomorrow, FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign goes live on Birchal. For the first time, you can invest in the grocery store that connects regenerative farms directly to families.

Here's what to expect.

The campaign page on Birchal will include our full disclosure document with financials, risks, team details, and our plan for the funds. Read it carefully. Take your time.

If you're a VIP member, you'll get early access before the campaign opens to the public. That means you can review the disclosure document and invest before the general waitlist.

If you haven't secured VIP access yet, there's still time. A $5 refundable deposit is all it takes.

The terms: minimum investment $50, maximum $10,000 per investor.

Investing in early-stage businesses carries risk. You could lose some or all of your investment. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

We'll send you the link as soon as the campaign is live.

FarmThru
creative_brief: Countdown email. Bold subject line. Short, punchy paragraphs. Countdown element or 'Tomorrow' badge in header. Single VIP CTA button. Birchal badge. Compliance disclaimer clearly visible but not dominating. Urgency through clarity, not pressure.
